channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alexa+ Personality Upgrade Should Hopefully Make It Less Annoying
item.description: Amazon is rolling out new personality styles for Alexa+, letting users choose how the assistant responds, from brief and direct to relaxed or upbeat, ...

item.title: The Trust Problem That Could Doom Smartglasses And AI Adoption
item.description: Backlash against smartglasses and AI is rooted in a lack of trust — and failing to solve for it may doom adoption of these new technologies.

item.title: Jack Dorsey Cut 4,000 Jobs For AI And Wall Street Added $8 Billion
item.description: Block's stock surged 24% after the biggest AI-driven layoff yet. The market's reaction just created an instruction manual for every CEO in tech.

item.title: Gotta Catch This One: LEGO Insiders’ Mini Pokémon Center (40911) Is Finally Here
item.description: There's a good chance that the LEGO Mini Pokémon Center will be a collector's item in future, and it's all yours for 2,500 Insiders Points.

item.title: What Is Customer Loyalty Management and Why Is It Important?
item.description: Discover what customer loyalty management is and why it plays a crucial role in building strong relationships with your clients. Explore strategies to...

item.title: Only ‘Ring Of Fire’ Solar Eclipse Photo Found — ‘Blood Moon’ Next For U.S
item.description: Feb. 17’s “ring of fire” annular solar eclipse was imaged from one of the only places to see it — a research station in Antarctica — from where the su...

item.title: Justice and luck

item.title: Microsoft Unveils Glass-Based Data Storage That Lasts 10,000 Years

item.title: No.
item.description: Is a complete sentence. So is, “yes.”

item.title: Love your customers

item.title: Time is the wildcard

item.title: Sarcasm self-defeats
